title: Review: remaining jmap.rs handlers pass
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — the security fixes (ULID entropy, authorization bypass) are the significant work this iteration. No new public API surface added. Remaining findings are elegance/clarity.
Confidence: 88% chance of no missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: haven't deeply audited chat_get, chat_query, contact_query paths. SQLite FK enforcement is off — orphaned data is possible but not a security issue in single-user model. Would raise confidence if: confirmed SQLite WAL mode is set to prevent concurrent write corruption.
